figures.caption: Table 3: Results on GraphQ. Bold numbers indicate the best result, and underlined numbers indicate the secondbest result.
Table 1: Performance on GrailQA. Bold numbers indicate the best result, and underlined numbers indicate the second-best result.
Table 2: Results on WebQSP. Bold numbers indicate the best result, and underlined numbers indicate the secondbest result.

Figure 8: Full trajectory view for the distilled-spirits case. The figure preserves the complete student–environment interaction chain and overlays full think-plus-action token scores for supervised turns.
Figure 5: Negative-tail mass of the token-level GAPD guide. Bars show the share of supervised generated tokens whose raw guide score g falls below −t.

Figure 2: Training dynamics and interaction efficiency. Left: reward curves comparing w/o GAPD and w/ GAPD runs; each curve plots mean reward (outcome reward + format reward), with faint per-step values and EMA-smoothed values using α = 0.2. Right: interaction-efficiency comparison, reporting average F1 over three benchmarks against average interactions or calls per query on a log scale.

Figure 1: Overview of GAPD. GRPO supplies supervision mainly through the final answer reward. GAPD uses ENTITY-ANCHOR MATCHING to align an on-policy student state with a gold execution state, conditions the current policy on the aligned gold action to obtain a self-teacher distribution, assigns dense guidance to the selected student tokens, and fuses this guidance with the original GRPO advantage.

Figure 7: Full trajectory view for the island comparison case. The figure preserves the complete student–environment interaction chain and overlays think-plus-action token scores for the supervised comparison turn. For readability, long result_mid_list fields and answer MID lists are truncated to the first ten entries, with ellipses marking omitted MIDs.
Figure 3: Case studies of GAPD. Each example shows the student action aligned to a gold action and highlights where token-level guidance is applied on the divergent span.
Figure 6: Full trajectory view for the time-zone case. The figure preserves the complete student–environment interaction chain and overlays full think-plus-action token scores for supervised turns.
